fields.Name: QuickBooks Online
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online is Intuit's cloud-based small-business accounting platform covering bookkeeping, invoicing, expenses, payroll integration, and financial reporting. It exposes a REST/JSON Accounting API v3 over OAuth 2.0 (authorization-code grant with refresh-token rotation) at https://quickbooks.api.intuit.com/v3/company/{realmId}. Accounting + Reports + CDC + Batch + Webhooks share the com.quickbooks.accounting scope; Payments is a separate product on the qbpayments.api.intuit.com host under com.quickbooks.payments scope (out of scope for this connector). Pagination is offset-based (STARTPOSITION + MAXRESULTS, max 1000). Batch API permits up to 30 mixed create/update/delete/query operations per request. Webhooks are signed via HMAC-SHA256 with the intuit-signature header. Incremental sync uses the /cdc endpoint with a 30-day window cap.
